description: You are a Robotics Engineer preparing a bipedal humanoid robot model for walking controller training. The raw CAD import lacks proper physical constraints, which will cause unrealistic "flamingo" bending and simulation instability. Configure the physics and kinematics in Webots by setting the global basicTimeStep to 8 and enabling selfCollision for the BIPED_ROBOT. For both the LEFT_KNEE and RIGHT_KNEE HingeJoints, set the minStop to 0.0, the maxStop to 2.5, and the dampingConstant to 0.5. Save the configured world to /home/ga/Desktop/biped_kinematics.wbt.
